tasks.description: Add per-try debug log to runOneTask capturing all error signals per Builder attempt
tasks.changes:
After the appendFileSync(reviewFile, ...) call inside the Builder retry loop, add a debug log write: use mkdirSync to create a 'debug-logs' dir in this.governor.config.stateDir, then writeFileSync a file named `debug-${runId}-task${task.id}-try${tryCount}.md` containing: '# Debug Log
**Task:** <description>
**Try:** <tryCount>

## Ground Truth
<groundTruth.join(newline)>

## Peltast Output
<peltastOut>

## Feedback sent to Builder
<lastPeltastFeedback>'. Wrap in try/catch (non-fatal).
